title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXVI. Riddles.
content:
[An Egg.]

        Humpty dumpty sate on a wall,
        Humpty dumpty had a great fall;
        Three score men and three score more
        Cannot place Humpty Dumpty as he was before.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCXVI. Riddles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
